name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BACKLOG-6
title: Add diagnostic/verbose mode to resolve-scope.py for debugging
description: resolve-scope.py emits the prompt only. When callers report a bad resolution, there's no way to inspect intermediate state (resolved repo_root, feature count, find-feature.py output). Add an opt-in --verbose flag that prints diagnostics to stderr without polluting stdout (the prompt).
